steps.result_preview:
cat docs/inbox-msg-processing.md
Inbox can contain messages coming in from the social media like Telegram or Discord accounts. In such case, the message would start with a line in format:

`Channel: Discord, Handle: @Handle`

These messages should be treated accordingly to their channel processing rule and authority. See [channels](channels) for more details

params.message:
Inbox message processed successfully. Created:
1. /accounts/acme-logistics.json - Account record for Acme Logistics
2. /contacts/sarah-chen.json - Contact record for Sarah Chen
3. /reminders/2032-08-05_invoice-follow-up.json - Follow-up reminder for invoice INV-2024-001 payment terms negotiation

Message from valid Telegram user @user32 has been classified and routed to appropriate CRM records.
